name: RenderContentChangeReason
summary: Enumeration denoting type of change for attach or detach

enum_values.name: Attach
enum_values.summary: Content is being attached by the RhinoDoc.AttachContent() or RenderContent.AttachChild() methods.

enum_values.name: Detach
enum_values.summary: Content is being detached by the RenderContent.DeleteContent() method.

enum_values.name: ChangeAttach
enum_values.summary: Content is being attached while changing.

enum_values.name: ChangeDetach
enum_values.summary: Content is being detached while changing.

enum_values.name: AttachUndo
enum_values.summary: Content is being attached during undo/redo

enum_values.name: DetachUndo
enum_values.summary: Content is being detached during undo/redo.

enum_values.name: Open
enum_values.summary: Content is being attached during open document

enum_values.name: Delete
enum_values.summary: Content is being detached during normal deletion.
